GridProps extended with persistColumnOrder?: boolean + columnOrderStorageKey?: string. UseColumnOrderPersistProps<TData> created with table, enabled, storageKey fields. All match spec Section 9.

A-03.evidence: spec Section 사용예시: Grid + useColumnDrag + useColumnOrderPersist usage compiles cleanly (tsc --noEmit 0 errors on both packages). Spec usage patterns (spread-skip for optional props, C-29) followed exactly.

AC-003: getKeyDownHandler + tabIndex=0 + onKeyDown on th. AC-004: isPinned guard in getKeyDownHandler + pinned skip loop. AC-005: tsc 0 errors. AC-006: PersistAndKeyboard story added.

C-31 wiring audit fully satisfied.

B-03.evidence: table.setColumnOrder(newOrder), table.getState().columnOrder, table.getAllLeafColumns(), table.getColumn(), column.getIsPinned() — all TanStack v8 standard exported APIs (C-2). No internal private field access.

specCodeDefects.defect: saveRef (useRef) + sync useEffect — saveRef.current is never read anywhere in the spec template. The hook returns { saveOrder } directly (L273) and the consumer (handleColumnOrderChange) captures saveOrder in useCallback deps. saveRef is a dead variable: unreachable by any read path.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Removed useRef + sync useEffect entirely. saveOrder function returned directly as { saveOrder }. useRef import removed from useColumnOrderPersist.ts (only useEffect retained).

distSizeDelta.note: Matches spec Section 13 estimate of +2 KB

feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: goals.json 3파일 vs spec Section 7 7파일 — spec 우선 적용 (D3 보정 반영). 7파일 모두 구현.
feedback.specCodeDefect: spec L238-242 saveRef + sync useEffect dead code 자율 정정 — useRef/sync useEffect 제거, saveOrder 직접 반환 유지
feedback.tabIndexUnconditional: tabIndex={0} is unconditional on all <th> per spec L747 — applies even when enableColumnReorder=false. This is intentional per spec Section 6 (opt-in changes are visible but non-breaking).
feedback.storybootstrapDeviation: PersistAndKeyboard story written to canonical path. Storybook app not bootstrapped — same deviation as G-001-storybook-bootstrap.md. C-25 satisfied by 'story file written' criterion.
